title: embedding_runs manifest.jsonl line
description: One JSON object per line in output/embedding_runs/manifest*.jsonl listing h5ad tasks for the embedding queue.

path.description: Absolute path to input .h5ad with materialized X.

dataset_id.description: Stable dataset key used under output/embeddings/<model>/<dataset_id>/.

category.description: e.g. atlas_TS, chempert — used for grouping / filtering.
